sentiment.reasoning: Missing revenue estimates by 7% is a clear negative signal regarding current business performance.

sentiment.reasoning: An 18% drop in new customer orders is a significant negative indicator of demand and future revenue.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
